name: DIGI INTERNATIONAL INC
summary: Digi International Inc. is a leading global provider of IoT connectivity products, services, and solutions. Founded in 1985 and headquartered in Hopkins, Minnesota, the company operates two segments: IoT Products & Services (embedded/wireless modules, routers, console servers, device management platforms) and IoT Solutions (SmartSense by Digi condition monitoring, Jolt Software task management, and Ventus Managed Network-as-a-Service). Digi serves OEM, enterprise, and government customers across banking, healthcare, retail, food service, transportation, and industrial markets.

products.name: Embedded and Wireless Modules
products.description: Modules enabling OEMs and enterprises to build secure IoT connectivity solutions.

products.name: Console Servers
products.description: Infrastructure management equipment for secure remote access and control.

products.name: Enterprise and Industrial Routers
products.description: Wired and wireless routers for IoT communication in enterprise and industrial environments.

products.name: Remote Manager Device Management Platform
products.description: Subscription-based platform allowing customers to remotely monitor and manage connected hardware.

products.name: SmartSense by Digi
products.description: Wireless temperature and condition-based monitoring services targeting food service, healthcare, and supply chain.

products.name: Jolt Software
products.description: Task management, workforce management, and labeling solutions for food retailers and restaurants.

products.name: Ventus MNaaS
products.description: Managed Network-as-a-Service providing cellular wireless and fixed line WAN connectivity solutions for enterprises.

partnerships.description: Cellular carrier relationship supporting IoT connectivity products and services.
